items.title: CVE-2026-54006
items.summary: CVE-2026-54006 is an authorization flaw (IDOR/broken access control) in Open WebUI prior to version 0.9.6. The event update endpoint validates write access to an event's current calendar but fails to check permissions on the destination calendar_id supplied in the request body, allowing any regular user to move events into another user's calendar if they know its ID. The issue is fixed in version 0.9.6.
